Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025) 200 upvotes, 11 comments
  2. Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2) 70 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Compiling Prolog to Forth [pdf] 111 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. CasNum 276 upvotes, 36 comments
  5. In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad 108 upvotes, 13 comments
  6. macOS code injection for fun and no profit (2024) 93 upvotes, 15 comments
  7. SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Lisp-style C++ template meta programming 47 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. To the Polypropylene Makers 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  10. How to run Qwen 3.5 locally 143 upvotes, 36 comments
  11. FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment 211 upvotes, 62 comments
  12. Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically 115 upvotes, 31 comments
  13. "Warn about PyPy being unmaintained" 169 upvotes, 52 comments
  14. Revisiting Time: UT1, UTC, NTP and NTS 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database 117 upvotes, 36 comments
  16. From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024) 28 upvotes, 5 comments
  17. Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Ten years of deploying to production 27 upvotes, 5 comments
  19. LLM Writing Tropes.md 193 upvotes, 78 comments
  20. Cloud VM benchmarks 2026 218 upvotes, 100 comments
  21. Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan 285 upvotes, 154 comments
  22. Files are the interface humans and agents interact with 216 upvotes, 119 comments
  23. Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video 74 upvotes, 37 comments
  24. MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games 73 upvotes, 40 comments
  25. A decade of Docker containers 296 upvotes, 203 comments
  26. Best performance of a C++ singleton 31 upvotes, 23 comments
  27. Digital Iris [video] 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. How important was the Battle of Hastings? 33 upvotes, 31 comments
  29. New Research Reassesses the Value of Agents.md Files for AI Coding 13 upvotes, 9 comments
  30. Llm9p: LLM as a Plan 9 file system 5 upvotes, 2 comments

Last generated 5:30pm, 8 March 2026. Source here.
